steps.title: Write out the addition
steps.content: The sum is $(3x^4 + 2x^3) + (4x^4 + 7x^3)$. Group terms by their exponent.

steps.title: Evaluate all choices
steps.content:
• A: $x^{14}$ — Exponents are added as if multiplying, not adding polynomials. Eliminated.
  • B: $x^8 + 9x^6$ — Exponents are doubled, not like terms combined. Eliminated.
  • C: $x^4 + 14x^3$ — The $x^3$ coefficient 14 comes from $7+7$ rather than $2+7$. Eliminated.
  • D: $x^4 + 9x^3$ — The $x^3$ coefficient 9 is correct ($2+7=9$). That matches choice D — D is correct.
